description: This Java class serves as a global exception handler for a Spring Boot application, managing various exception types and returning structured API error responses.

classes.name: GlobalExceptionHandler
classes.description: A Spring Boot REST controller advice that handles exceptions globally and returns structured API error responses.

methods.name: handleValidation
methods.description: Handles validation errors from method arguments and constructs a detailed API error response.

methods.name: handleSpringErrorResponse
methods.description: Handles specific Spring ErrorResponseExceptions and responds with appropriate status and message.

methods.name: handleIllegalArg
methods.description: Handles IllegalArgumentException exceptions and returns a BAD_REQUEST response.

methods.name: handleGeneric
methods.description: Handles all other exceptions and returns an internal server error response.
